objective: Close F-0153 by replacing the paginated admin-list reuse in AI paper platform source resolution with one dedicated, complete and stably ordered repository read, and by reloading already selected platform questions through an exact public-id bounded read for personal learning-session and organization-training draft materialization. Preserve existing profession, level, subject, available-status, knowledge-scope, role-source and authorization boundaries without schema, migration, persistent database execution, Provider calls or entitlement expansion.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
new role, entitlement, authorization scope, quota or default capability
generated draft inclusion as formal source or enterprise cross-organization source
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApiCallers: Content, personal and organization AI paper routes all converge through resolveAndAssembleAiPaperFromRoute. Personal learning-session creation and organization draft detail materialization later re-read the selected platform questions.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: ai-paper-route-source-resolution-service currently calls listQuestions page 1 with pageSize at most 100. The personal learning-session resolver and admin local-contract route repeat the same first-page lookup before filtering selected public IDs.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: QuestionRepository listQuestions is an admin pagination contract. The task adds a dedicated AI paper source read that applies profession, level, subject, available status and optional exact knowledge/public-id filters in the database, returns the complete bounded set in stable updatedAt/publicId order and hydrates relationships in batches.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing question, question_knowledge_node, knowledge_node, options, scoring points and tag tables contain all required source facts. No schema or migration source is needed.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Repository condition tests plus source, wiring, personal request, learning-session, admin draft and knowledge-scope regressions cover 101/1000-sized collections, sparse matches beyond the former first page, exact selected-id recovery, deduplication, source scope and insufficiency semantics.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: The AI generation recontract traceability requires local assembly from every eligible formal source, maximum 80 selected questions, truthful insufficiency and role-specific source isolation. ADR-002 keeps database reads in the repository and ADR-007 keeps effective authorization in existing callers.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No F-0154 metadata repair, F-0170 history join, F-0146 content-version snapshot, schema, migration, real database, Provider, dependency, permission, deployment or mechanism change.
